{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.0,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.3,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, clarity, and conciseness without changing technical content.",
    "RX.1": "While polishing, maintain or appropriately signal hedging and do not introduce unwarranted certainty about assumptions or representativeness.",
    "RX.2": "Edits must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the text and study support, preserving careful qualifiers (e.g., 'we believe', 'representative').",
    "RX.3": "Stay strictly within polishing scope and do not alter structure, methods, parameter values, or study design.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid wording changes that could cause misinterpretation of the setup (e.g., N, capacities, horizons) and thereby lead to misuse.",
    "RX.5": "Retain all original numerical values, units, time frames, and market labels so readers can trace the setup to its sources."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request 'Polish this' targets sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, clarity, and conciseness without changing technical content.
rationale.RX.1: While polishing, maintain or appropriately signal hedging and do not introduce unwarranted certainty about assumptions or representativeness.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the text and study support, preserving careful qualifiers (e.g., 'we believe', 'representative').
rationale.RX.3: Stay strictly within polishing scope and do not alter structure, methods, parameter values, or study design.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid wording changes that could cause misinterpretation of the setup (e.g., N, capacities, horizons) and thereby lead to misuse.
rationale.RX.5: Retain all original numerical values, units, time frames, and market labels so readers can trace the setup to its sources.
